titleStmt.title: SII 16.222: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 222. (A.R. No. 605 of 1907.) NANDALŪR, RAJAMPET TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in the flower garden of the Saumyanāthasvāmin temple.

This is dated Śaka 1490, Piṅgala, Āshāḍha ba. 11. The cyclic year Piṅgala corresponded to Śaka 1479 (not 1490) and the details of the date viz., Āshāḍha, ba 11 may be equated to 1557 A.D., July 22, (Thursday).

The inscription records a gift of land in Kaḍapa-sīma situated in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma of Uddagiri-rājya, to god Chokkanātha of Nelandalūru, by Obuḷarāju, son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyāla Aubhaḷrāju. Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma in Uddagiri-rājya is said to have been obtained by the donor as nāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śubhamastū . Ētatbhraṁhmēṁdraru
drādi mavuḷimālōpalāḷitaṁ .
ṁ śrīmaccuṁdaranāthasya śāsanaṁ
lōkaviśṛtaṁ . svastiśrī jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śatavaruṣa
ṁbulayina 1490 Agunēṭi piṁga
ḷa saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha ba 1 lu
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī
vīra sadāsivarāyadēvamahā
rāyalu vijayanagaramaṁ
du pṛthivisāmrājaṁ śēyu
cuṁḍḍaṁgānu śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdyāla A
vubhaḷarājuṁgāri putṛlai
na vōbuḷarājuṁgāru
nelaṁdalūri śrīcokanā
ṁdhuni polivūṭu
sama¨rpiṁccina bhū dāna
silāśāsana kramamu
sadāśivadēvamahārāyalu
māku nāyaṁkkārānaku pāliṁ
cina vuddagirirājyānaku cellē ghaṁ
ḍikōṭa śīmalōni kaḍapa sī
mayaṁdu yekādaśi pu
lamaṁdu mā Ācāryula
kṣamaṁdu svāmiki sama¨rpiṁ
Āḷuvā¨rlaku tirunakṣatrāna
janālakuṁṭa gavuḷapāli
du maḍi kha . 0 yēṁdumu
staḷa 2Ø . vubha kha . 2Ø ye
nnuyirusanu śrīcokkanāthaperu
māḷa tirumaṁjanakā¨rtti
Avadhariṁcca taḷige 1 ki A
ḍi mu 4 nālugu muṁttaluContinuation is
Digital edition of SII 16.222 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
